--- Generate LLVM IR files(.ll) for host and device
--- Translate the kernel bitcode by using CuPBoP's kernel translator
init_block
; ModuleID = 'gaussian-cuda-nvptx64-nvidia-cuda-sm_50.bc'
source_filename = "./gaussian.cu"
target datalayout = "e-i64:64-i128:128-v16:16-v32:32-n16:32:64"
target triple = "nvptx64-nvidia-cuda"

%struct.__cuda_builtin_threadIdx_t = type { i8 }
%struct.__cuda_builtin_blockIdx_t = type { i8 }
%struct.__cuda_builtin_blockDim_t = type { i8 }
%printf_args = type { i32, i32, i32, i32, i32, i32 }

$_ZN26__cuda_builtin_threadIdx_t17__fetch_builtin_xEv = comdat any

$_ZN25__cuda_builtin_blockIdx_t17__fetch_builtin_xEv = comdat any

$_ZN25__cuda_builtin_blockDim_t17__fetch_builtin_xEv = comdat any

$_ZN26__cuda_builtin_threadIdx_t17__fetch_builtin_yEv = comdat any

$_ZN25__cuda_builtin_blockIdx_t17__fetch_builtin_yEv = comdat any

$_ZN25__cuda_builtin_blockDim_t17__fetch_builtin_yEv = comdat any

@threadIdx = extern_weak dso_local addrspace(1) global %struct.__cuda_builtin_threadIdx_t, align 1
@blockIdx = extern_weak dso_local addrspace(1) global %struct.__cuda_builtin_blockIdx_t, align 1
@blockDim = extern_weak dso_local addrspace(1) global %struct.__cuda_builtin_blockDim_t, align 1
@.str = private unnamed_addr constant [98 x i8] c"blockIdx.x: %d, threadIdx.x: %d, blockIdx.y: %d, threadIdx.y: %d, blockDim.x: %d, blockDim.y: %d\0A\00", align 1, !dbg !0

; Function Attrs: convergent mustprogress noinline norecurse nounwind optnone
define dso_local void @_Z4Fan1PfS_ii(ptr noundef %m_cuda, ptr noundef %a_cuda, i32 noundef %Size, i32 noundef %t) #0 !dbg !1018 {
entry:
  %m_cuda.addr = alloca ptr, align 8
  %a_cuda.addr = alloca ptr, align 8
  %Size.addr = alloca i32, align 4
  %t.addr = alloca i32, align 4
  store ptr %m_cuda, ptr %m_cuda.addr, align 8
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %m_cuda.addr, metadata !1022, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1023
  store ptr %a_cuda, ptr %a_cuda.addr, align 8
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %a_cuda.addr, metadata !1024, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1025
  store i32 %Size, ptr %Size.addr, align 4
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %Size.addr, metadata !1026, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1027
  store i32 %t, ptr %t.addr, align 4
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %t.addr, metadata !1028, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1029
  %call = call noundef i32 @_ZN26__cuda_builtin_threadIdx_t17__fetch_builtin_xEv() #3, !dbg !1030
  %call1 = call noundef i32 @_ZN25__cuda_builtin_blockIdx_t17__fetch_builtin_xEv() #3, !dbg !1032
  %call2 = call noundef i32 @_ZN25__cuda_builtin_blockDim_t17__fetch_builtin_xEv() #3, !dbg !1033
  %mul = mul i32 %call1, %call2, !dbg !1034
  %add = add i32 %call, %mul, !dbg !1035
  %0 = load i32, ptr %Size.addr, align 4, !dbg !1036
  %sub = sub nsw i32 %0, 1, !dbg !1037
  %1 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1038
  %sub3 = sub nsw i32 %sub, %1, !dbg !1039
  %cmp = icmp uge i32 %add, %sub3, !dbg !1040
  br i1 %cmp, label %if.then, label %if.end, !dbg !1041

if.then:                                          ; preds = %entry
  br label %return, !dbg !1042

if.end:                                           ; preds = %entry
  %2 = load ptr, ptr %a_cuda.addr, align 8, !dbg !1043

}

; ModuleID = 'gaussian-cuda-nvptx64-nvidia-cuda-sm_50.bc'
source_filename = "./gaussian.cu"
target datalayout = "e-i64:64-i128:128-v16:16-v32:32-n16:32:64"
target triple = "nvptx64-nvidia-cuda"

%struct.__cuda_builtin_threadIdx_t = type { i8 }
%struct.__cuda_builtin_blockIdx_t = type { i8 }
%struct.__cuda_builtin_blockDim_t = type { i8 }
%printf_args = type { i32, i32, i32, i32, i32, i32 }

$_ZN26__cuda_builtin_threadIdx_t17__fetch_builtin_xEv = comdat any

$_ZN25__cuda_builtin_blockIdx_t17__fetch_builtin_xEv = comdat any

$_ZN25__cuda_builtin_blockDim_t17__fetch_builtin_xEv = comdat any

$_ZN26__cuda_builtin_threadIdx_t17__fetch_builtin_yEv = comdat any

$_ZN25__cuda_builtin_blockIdx_t17__fetch_builtin_yEv = comdat any

$_ZN25__cuda_builtin_blockDim_t17__fetch_builtin_yEv = comdat any

@threadIdx = extern_weak dso_local addrspace(1) global %struct.__cuda_builtin_threadIdx_t, align 1
@blockIdx = extern_weak dso_local addrspace(1) global %struct.__cuda_builtin_blockIdx_t, align 1
@blockDim = extern_weak dso_local addrspace(1) global %struct.__cuda_builtin_blockDim_t, align 1
@.str = private unnamed_addr constant [98 x i8] c"blockIdx.x: %d, threadIdx.x: %d, blockIdx.y: %d, threadIdx.y: %d, blockDim.x: %d, blockDim.y: %d\0A\00", align 1, !dbg !0
@intra_warp_index = global i32 0
@inter_warp_index = global i32 0
@block_size = external global i32
@block_size_x = external global i32
@block_size_y = external global i32
@block_size_z = external global i32
@grid_size_x = external global i32
@grid_size_y = external global i32
@grid_size_z = external global i32
@block_index_x = external dso_local thread_local global i32
@block_index_y = external dso_local thread_local global i32
@block_index_z = external dso_local thread_local global i32
@warp_shfl = external thread_local global [32 x i32]

  store i32 %add22, ptr %yidx, align 4, !dbg !1161
  %16 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.ctaid.x(), !dbg !1170
  %17 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.tid.x(), !dbg !1172

  %21 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.ntid.y(), !dbg !1180
  %22 = getelementptr inbounds %printf_args, ptr %tmp, i32 0, i32 0, !dbg !1182
  store i32 %16, ptr %22, align 4, !dbg !1182
  %23 = getelementptr inbounds %printf_args, ptr %tmp, i32 0, i32 1, !dbg !1182

  %29 = load ptr, ptr %m_cuda.addr, align 8, !dbg !1183
  %30 = load i32, ptr %Size.addr, align 4, !dbg !1184
  %31 = load i32, ptr %xidx, align 4, !dbg !1185
  %add29 = add nsw i32 %31, 1, !dbg !1186
  %32 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1187
  %add30 = add nsw i32 %add29, %32, !dbg !1188
  %mul31 = mul nsw i32 %30, %add30, !dbg !1189
  %33 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1190
  %add32 = add nsw i32 %mul31, %33, !dbg !1191
  %idxprom = sext i32 %add32 to i64, !dbg !1183
  %arrayidx = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %29, i64 %idxprom, !dbg !1183
  %34 = load float, ptr %arrayidx, align 4, !dbg !1183
  %35 = load ptr, ptr %a_cuda.addr, align 8, !dbg !1192
  %36 = load i32, ptr %Size.addr, align 4, !dbg !1193
  %37 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1194
  %mul33 = mul nsw i32 %36, %37, !dbg !1195
  %38 = load i32, ptr %yidx, align 4, !dbg !1196
  %39 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1197
  %add34 = add nsw i32 %38, %39, !dbg !1198
  %add35 = add nsw i32 %mul33, %add34, !dbg !1199

  %mul38 = fmul contract float %34, %40, !dbg !1200
  %41 = load ptr, ptr %a_cuda.addr, align 8, !dbg !1201
  %42 = load i32, ptr %Size.addr, align 4, !dbg !1202
  %43 = load i32, ptr %xidx, align 4, !dbg !1203

  %add40 = add nsw i32 %add39, %44, !dbg !1206
  %mul41 = mul nsw i32 %42, %add40, !dbg !1207

  %46 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1209
  %add42 = add nsw i32 %45, %46, !dbg !1210
  %add43 = add nsw i32 %mul41, %add42, !dbg !1211
  %idxprom44 = sext i32 %add43 to i64, !dbg !1201

  %47 = load float, ptr %arrayidx45, align 4, !dbg !1212
  %sub46 = fsub contract float %47, %mul38, !dbg !1212
  store float %sub46, ptr %arrayidx45, align 4, !dbg !1212
  %48 = load i32, ptr %yidx, align 4, !dbg !1213
  %cmp47 = icmp eq i32 %48, 0, !dbg !1215
  br i1 %cmp47, label %if.then48, label %if.end64, !dbg !1216

if.then48:                                        ; preds = %if.end12
  %49 = load ptr, ptr %m_cuda.addr, align 8, !dbg !1217
  %50 = load i32, ptr %Size.addr, align 4, !dbg !1219
  %51 = load i32, ptr %xidx, align 4, !dbg !1220

  %idxprom56 = sext i32 %57 to i64, !dbg !1229
  %arrayidx57 = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %56, i64 %idxprom56, !dbg !1229
  %58 = load float, ptr %arrayidx57, align 4, !dbg !1229
  %mul58 = fmul contract float %55, %58, !dbg !1231
  %59 = load ptr, ptr %b_cuda.addr, align 8, !dbg !1232
  %60 = load i32, ptr %xidx, align 4, !dbg !1233
  %add59 = add nsw i32 %60, 1, !dbg !1234
  %61 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1235
  %add60 = add nsw i32 %add59, %61, !dbg !1236
  %idxprom61 = sext i32 %add60 to i64, !dbg !1232
  %arrayidx62 = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %59, i64 %idxprom61, !dbg !1232
  %62 = load float, ptr %arrayidx62, align 4, !dbg !1237
  %sub63 = fsub contract float %62, %mul58, !dbg !1237
  store float %sub63, ptr %arrayidx62, align 4, !dbg !1237
  br label %if.end64, !dbg !1238

if.end64:                                         ; preds = %if.then, %if.then11, %if.then48, %if.end12
  br label %if.end64_after_block_sync_4

if.end64_after_block_sync_4:                      ; preds = %if.end64
  call void @llvm.nvvm.barrier0()
  br label %if.end64_after_block_sync_0, !dbg !1239

if.end64_after_block_sync_0:                      ; preds = %if.end64_after_block_sync_4
  ret void, !dbg !1239
}

define dso_local void @_Z4Fan1PfS_ii(ptr noundef %m_cuda, ptr noundef %a_cuda, i32 noundef %Size, i32 noundef %t) #0 {
entry:
  %0 = load i32, ptr @block_size, align 4
  %m_cuda.addr = alloca ptr, align 8
  br label %entry_after_block_sync_1

  %Size.addr = alloca i32, align 4

entry_after_block_sync_1_after_block_sync_3:      ; preds = %entry_after_block_sync_1

intra_warp_init:                                  ; preds = %entry_after_block_sync_1_after_block_sync_3
  store i32 0, ptr @intra_warp_index, align 4
  br label %intra_warp_cond

intra_warp_inc:                                   ; preds = %return
  %1 = load i32, ptr @intra_warp_index, align 4
  %intra_warp_index_increment = add i32 %1, 1
  store i32 %intra_warp_index_increment, ptr @intra_warp_index, align 4

  %2 = load i32, ptr @intra_warp_index, align 4
  %3 = icmp ult i32 %2, %0

entry_after_block_sync_1_after_block_sync_2:      ; preds = %intra_warp_cond
  store ptr %m_cuda, ptr %m_cuda.addr, align 8, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1021
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %m_cuda.addr, metadata !1022, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1027
  store ptr %a_cuda, ptr %a_cuda.addr, align 8, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1021

  %93 = load i32, ptr %Size.addr, align 4, !dbg !1210, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1108
  %94 = load i32, ptr @inter_warp_index, align 4, !dbg !1211, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1108
  %95 = load i32, ptr @intra_warp_index, align 4, !dbg !1211, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1108
  %96 = mul i32 %94, 32, !dbg !1211
  %thread_idx2 = add i32 %95, %96, !dbg !1211

  %101 = load i32, ptr @intra_warp_index, align 4, !dbg !1216, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1108

  %add42 = add nsw i32 %104, %105, !dbg !1218

  %idxprom44 = sext i32 %add43 to i64, !dbg !1209

  %sub46 = fsub contract float %106, %mul38, !dbg !1220

  %107 = load i32, ptr @inter_warp_index, align 4, !dbg !1221, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1108
  %108 = load i32, ptr @intra_warp_index, align 4, !dbg !1221, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1108

  %thread_idx6 = add i32 %108, %109, !dbg !1221

  %111 = load i32, ptr %110, align 4, !dbg !1221, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1108, !divergence !1223
  %cmp47 = icmp eq i32 %111, 0, !dbg !1224
  br i1 %cmp47, label %if.then48, label %if.end64, !dbg !1225

if.then48:                                        ; preds = %if.end12
  %112 = load ptr, ptr %m_cuda.addr, align 8, !dbg !1226, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1108
  %113 = load i32, ptr %Size.addr, align 4, !dbg !1228, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1108

  %115 = load i32, ptr @intra_warp_index, align 4, !dbg !1229, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1108

  %126 = load float, ptr %arrayidx55, align 4, !dbg !1226, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1108

  %130 = load ptr, ptr %b_cuda.addr, align 8, !dbg !1241, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1108
  %131 = load i32, ptr @inter_warp_index, align 4, !dbg !1242, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1108
  %132 = load i32, ptr @intra_warp_index, align 4, !dbg !1242, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1108

  %134 = getelementptr i32, ptr %xidx_intra_warp_, i32 %thread_idx, !dbg !1242
  %135 = load i32, ptr %134, align 4, !dbg !1242, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1108
  %add59 = add nsw i32 %135, 1, !dbg !1243
  %136 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1244, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1108
  %add60 = add nsw i32 %add59, %136, !dbg !1245
  %idxprom61 = sext i32 %add60 to i64, !dbg !1241
  %arrayidx62 = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %130, i64 %idxprom61, !dbg !1241
  %137 = load float, ptr %arrayidx62, align 4, !dbg !1246, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1108
  %sub63 = fsub contract float %137, %mul58, !dbg !1246
  store float %sub63, ptr %arrayidx62, align 4, !dbg !1246, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1108
  br label %if.end64, !dbg !1247

if.end64:                                         ; preds = %if.then, %if.then11, %if.then48, %if.end12
  br label %intra_warp_inc

reset_block:                                      ; preds = %intra_warp_cond
  store i32 0, ptr @intra_warp_index, align 4
  br label %if.end64_after_block_sync_4

if.end64_after_block_sync_4:                      ; preds = %reset_block
  br label %if.end64_after_block_sync_0, !dbg !1248

if.end64_after_block_sync_0:                      ; preds = %if.end64_after_block_sync_4
  ret void, !dbg !1248
}

define dso_local void @_Z4Fan1PfS_ii(ptr noundef %m_cuda, ptr noundef %a_cuda, i32 noundef %Size, i32 noundef %t) #0 {
entry:

  %local_inter_warp_idx = alloca i32, align 4

  %0 = load i32, ptr @block_size, align 4
  %m_cuda.addr = alloca ptr, align 8

entry_after_block_sync_1:                         ; preds = %entry
  %a_cuda.addr = alloca ptr, align 8
  %Size.addr = alloca i32, align 4
  %t.addr = alloca i32, align 4

entry_after_block_sync_1_after_block_sync_3:      ; preds = %entry_after_block_sync_1
  br label %intra_warp_init

intra_warp_init:                                  ; preds = %entry_after_block_sync_1_after_block_sync_3
  store i32 0, ptr %local_intra_warp_idx, align 4
  br label %intra_warp_cond

intra_warp_inc:                                   ; preds = %return
  %1 = load i32, ptr %local_intra_warp_idx, align 4
  %intra_warp_index_increment = add i32 %1, 1
  store i32 %intra_warp_index_increment, ptr %local_intra_warp_idx, align 4
  br label %intra_warp_cond

intra_warp_cond:                                  ; preds = %intra_warp_inc, %intra_warp_init
  %2 = load i32, ptr %local_intra_warp_idx, align 4
  %3 = icmp ult i32 %2, %0
  br i1 %3, label %entry_after_block_sync_1_after_block_sync_2, label %reset_block, !llvm.loop !1018

entry_after_block_sync_1_after_block_sync_2:      ; preds = %intra_warp_cond
  store ptr %m_cuda, ptr %m_cuda.addr, align 8, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1021
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %m_cuda.addr, metadata !1022, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1027
  store ptr %a_cuda, ptr %a_cuda.addr, align 8, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1021
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %a_cuda.addr, metadata !1028, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1029
  store i32 %Size, ptr %Size.addr, align 4, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1021
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %Size.addr, metadata !1030, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1031
  store i32 %t, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1021
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %t.addr, metadata !1032, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1033

  %5 = mul i32 %4, 4, !dbg !1034
  %6 = load i32, ptr %local_intra_warp_idx, align 4, !dbg !1034

  %thread_id_x = srem i32 %thread_idx, %7, !dbg !1034

  %sub = sub nsw i32 %14, 1, !dbg !1047
  %15 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1048, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1021
  %sub3 = sub nsw i32 %sub, %15, !dbg !1049
  %cmp = icmp uge i32 %add, %sub3, !dbg !1050
  br i1 %cmp, label %if.then, label %if.end, !dbg !1051

if.then:                                          ; preds = %entry_after_block_sync_1_after_block_sync_2
  br label %return, !dbg !1052

if.end:                                           ; preds = %entry_after_block_sync_1_after_block_sync_2

  br label %return, !dbg !1098

return:                                           ; preds = %if.end, %if.then
  br label %intra_warp_inc

reset_block:                                      ; preds = %intra_warp_cond
  store i32 0, ptr %local_intra_warp_idx, align 4
  br label %return_after_block_sync_4

return_after_block_sync_4:                        ; preds = %reset_block
  br label %return_after_block_sync_0, !dbg !1098

return_after_block_sync_0:                        ; preds = %return_after_block_sync_4
  ret void, !dbg !1098
}

}

define void @Fan2PfS_S_iii_wrapper(ptr %0) {
  %2 = getelementptr ptr, ptr %0, i32 0
  %3 = load ptr, ptr %2, align 8

  %9 = load i32, ptr %8, align 4
  %10 = getelementptr ptr, ptr %0, i32 4
  %11 = load i32, ptr %10, align 4
  %12 = getelementptr ptr, ptr %0, i32 5
  %13 = load i32, ptr %12, align 4
  call void @_Z4Fan2PfS_S_iii(ptr %3, ptr %5, ptr %7, i32 %9, i32 %11, i32 %13)
  ret void
}

  %21 = phi i32 [ %4, %if.end ], [ %4, %entry_after_block_sync_1_after_block_sync_2 ], [ %.pre, %if.then48 ], [ %.pre, %if.end12 ]
  %intra_warp_index_increment = add nuw i32 %local_intra_warp_idx.0102, 1
  %exitcond.not = icmp eq i32 %intra_warp_index_increment, %0
  br i1 %exitcond.not, label %reset_block, label %entry_after_block_sync_1_after_block_sync_2, !llvm.loop !1048

reset_block:                                      ; preds = %if.end64, %entry
  ret void, !dbg !1110
}

; Function Attrs: mustprogress nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)

declare i32 @vx_printf(ptr noalias, ...) local_unnamed_addr

; Function Attrs: norecurse nounwind

  %2 = load ptr, ptr %0, align 8
  %3 = getelementptr ptr, ptr %0, i64 1
  %4 = load ptr, ptr %3, align 8

}
